name: look-git
description: A modern Git extension with visual commit graph, changes panel, stash management, and commit history.

lookGit.fontSize.markdownDescription: Controls the font size used by Look Git webviews. Set to `0` to follow VS Code `editor.fontSize`.

commands.title: Checkout and Rebase onto Current Branch
Reveal Branch Worktree in File Explorer
Rebase Current Branch onto This Branch

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run build:webview && npm run build:extension
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run build:webview && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.test:integration: npm run compile && npm run compile:tests && node ./out/tests/integration/runTest.js
scripts.test:e2e: npm run compile && npm run compile:tests && node ./out/tests/e2e/runE2e.js
